title: CHAMINUKA NDIMAMBO
author: ABASID 1841
description: Teaching from THE ABASID CALIPHATE collection: CHAMINUKA NDIMAMBO (Chaminuka is King)

verses.text: 11.CHAMINUKA NDIMAMBO 11/01/26
Nyangwe akati handisi munhu, munhu chete
Kuti muzo nzwisisawo MAONERO angu, regai ndimbo kuratidzai Pandakaona MAONERO aBaba JOHANI, andaka bvuma

Ukanzwa anoti Mwari ano gumbuka nekuti wavhura Tsamba yakanzi BABA JOHANI, iti no problem
MAONERO ako
Mwari anga gumbuke kuti watsvaga nhau dza BABA JOHANI mutsamba rawanzwa kuti rinadzo
Asi oregera kugumbuka pamuno tevera Chidhakwa ku doro . Muchiti haaa mdara wacho ahacha namata, asi akafamba na Johani, handei tino tsvaga nhoroondo

1931 IZWI rakauya kuzotaura kuti mava ku MAVAMBO e MAGUMO
Kwakanga kuri kuvamba Kwe MAGUMO
Saka CHAMINUKA ahai kwanisa kuuya ne SHOKO rakazouya na BABA JOHANI KA
Nekuti nguva ya akararama akanga asati ava MAVAMBO e MAGUMO

Honai patsamba apo,
IZWI ra Baba Johani riri kutaura mauiro arakaita ku ZIMBABWE

Nekuti vakanga vasati va berekwa

Hanzi ndini ndakauya ndaka tungamira VACHENA
Nekuti IZWI rakavambira ku vanhu vatema

Imimi mhani

Saka hunzi na BABA JOHANI
Makazvi ita ndokubva vaenda havo ku VACHENA
Havana kuisa makore asi ndokupai
Rakanga riri ku vachena kwe about 2000 years
Muri murima mhani
Pamakazo ona vachena vava kuuya kuno, ndiro rakati kwavari ndiperekedzei kwandinobva

Rikati kwete, ndichanokupai minda ne rugare
Zvedi rasvika navo vaka pihwa minda ne minda

DHUUUUUU kufunga
Ndikati pandinosvika ku vanhu vaye , kureva imi, ndika sarudza nyama yeku gara, vanoibaya
Saka ndino fanira kutanga ndaisa anova tonga
Kuti vadzikame
Ndo parakati VACHENA handei munotonga vanhu avo vapere kuzvikudza ndozoti ndo berekwa muchi vatonga
Vachena ndo pavakauya vakabva vaisa mutemo, ukauraya munhu uri kuenda kujeri kana kuurawa

Ndo saka Mwari akapa vachena simba reku tonga imi
Dai pasina mitemo ye hurumende mungadai makanoti kanda mudziva takadziga dombo

Ndo pane kuimba kuya kunoti MEDETERANEAN NDAVA KUENDA , JERUSAREMA NDAONEKA, pachitaurwa kuoneka kwezwi kubva kuvachena.

Ipapa ndo pane nhau ye MHONDORO pa muonde neku chomukaka, ne musha wakasvikira Baba Johani ku Mhondoro kwa MUTUMHA.

Tiri kutaura Gore ra 1841ad
Handisi kuda kudzika dzika ne nhau ino pinza BABA JOHANI stereki
Ndangoi pinzira kuti ndiwane kuisa nhau yangu, vamwe ve Masowe vari pano vasazo funga kuti vakutaurirwa zvino rwisa mutumwa
But ndakato taura kuti ini ndiri kutaura nha dze izwi before 1931, vamwe vakati ranga risati rauya
Ndo vanda ratidza kuti ko inga izwi pa mutumwa rakati ndakauya kare, uye kwaitova kudzoka futi hameno kechingani
KUDENGA kune ma GATE 12
Every 2000 years tino pinda new GATE
Gate rega rega imba
Imba imwe ne imwe ine zvayo
Ne mitemo yayo
Zvaka fanana ne bedroom ne kitchen kusiyana kwazvo
Mu bedroom hamuna stove
Mu kitchen hamuna mubhedha
Saka mutemo wekuti , usasiye usina kudzima stove ku plug, hau wanikwe mu bedroom kana toilet
Every 2000 years Kunotumwa mutumwa kuzoti zivisa kuti mava kupinda mu imba inoda mitemo yakaita sei
Zvino GATE rekupinda mu nyika itsva iyi rino nongedzwa ne IZWI irori ra BABA JOHANI

Rino chinja chinja nzvimbo
